0.q: we confirmed that overexpression of oAANAT and oHIOMT genes in switchgrass resulted in the increase of endogenous melatonin content.

1.q: we confirmed that overexpression of oAANAT and oHIOMT genes in switchgrass resulted in the increase of endogenous melatonin content.

2.q: AANAT converts serotonin to N-acetylserotonin and HIOMT serves as the rate-limiting enzyme catalyzing the final synthesis of melatonin from N-acetylserotonin.

3.q: AANAT converts serotonin to N-acetylserotonin and HIOMT serves as the rate-limiting enzyme catalyzing the final synthesis of melatonin from N-acetylserotonin.
